questions.question: Consider an image degraded by additive Gaussian white noise with a standard deviation of 10. If the noise has a mean of 0, which of the following best describes the effect of noise on the image? Provide a short explanation.

An image is restored using the Mean Median Blur (MMB) algorithm. What is the primary advantage of using MMB over other image restoration techniques in the presence of only additive Gaussian white noise?
A noisy image is restored using the Wiener filter. What is the key assumption made by the Wiener filter to ensure optimal performance in the presence of additive Gaussian white noise?
questions.hint: Wiener filter, image restoration, noise characteristics
